prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game boss card art, square illustration
Primary request: boss art for Vavarda, a Rift Warden emerging from a violet dimensional tear
Scene/background: ritual battlefield split by a vertical arcane rift, broken cathedral floor, storm clouds, magical fragments in the air
Subject: gigantic armored boss with jagged obsidian plating, glowing violet core, heavy weapon or clawed gauntlet, central and intimidating
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy boss illustration, mobile game quality, stylized realism, readable silhouette and strong boss presence
Composition/framing: centered monster, square crop, close enough to feel threatening, clear negative space around the silhouette
Lighting/mood: hostile, urgent, active combat energy, rift glow from behind, violent purple highlights
Color palette: obsidian black, iron gray, hot violet, crimson undertones
Materials/textures: cracked stone, jagged armor, burning rift particles, magical smoke
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no tiny distant composition, one boss only, must read instantly as a boss encounter
